connection.offlineAria: Taƴtorde ndee woni e mbaydi ceŋol alaa; maa tan woni e taƴtagol
connection.onlineAria: Taƴtorde ndee woni e mbaydi gollondiral rewde e {type}; aɗa waawi lollinde URL tee taƴtaa e woɗɓe
connection.switchOfflineAria: Ñif gollondiral taƴtagol tee artu e mbaydi ceŋol alaa
connection.switchWebRTCAria: Yah e gollondiral taƴtagol rewde e WebRTC
connection.switchWebSocketAria: Yah e gollondiral taƴtagol rewde e WebSocket

share.collaborationLinkTooltip: Waɗ fork e ɗeeɗol ngol hade maa huutoraade ndee golle
share.embedCodeAria: Heɓ koddu naatnugol janngirde woodnde e taƴtorde
share.externalResourceAria: Huutoro URL ɗeeɗol boowal ngam lollinde e taƴtorde
share.githubGistLinkTooltip: Alaa e sago nde piilol ngol jaltinaa to GitHub Gist hade maa huutoraade ndee golle
share.githubGistLinkAria: Loow janngirde LiaScript iwde e jaltal GitHub Gist gadii
share.dataUriAria: Lollin janngirde woodnde e LiaScript, loowdi ndi woni nder URL
share.fileUrlTooltip: Ndee golle woodi tan so a lollinii jogorɗe boowal
share.downloadZip: Aawto pirooje oo fof no piilol ZIP
share.githubGistAria: Danndu ɗeeɗol ngol e GitHub no gist
share.githubGistTooltip: Waɗ fork e ɗeeɗol ngol hade maa huutoraade ndee golle
share.nostrLinkTooltip: You have to publish this file to Nostr before you can use this functionality
share.nostrLinkAria: Load the LiaScript course from a previous Nostr publication
share.exporterAria: Send the whole project to a LiaScript Exporter to convert it to SCORM, PDF, APK, ...
share.exporterTooltip: Hand the entire project to a local or remote LiaScript Exporter for conversion
share.githubRepoFileTooltip: Open the active file as a LiaScript course from the linked GitHub repository (push your changes first). Only available for GitHub-linked projects.

modal.collaborationBody: So a lollinii jokkorde les ndee, taƴtorde ndee uddittee e mbaydi gollondiral. Golle ceŋol alaa kadi ena waawi, kono huutorɓe ceŋiiɓe fof maa ngollu e janngirde wootere. So a heɓii ɗum rewde e jokkorde gollondiral tee aɗa yiɗi sosde janngirde hesere haa timmi, dobo butoŋ "Fork", ɗum sosat yamre hesere haa timmi.
modal.externalResourceBody: Huutoro URL oo ngam suɓaade loowdi jokkorde lollingol maa ko adii. E oo mbaydi taƴtorde ndee maa eto loowaade piilol Markdown tee naatna loowdi mum. Ndee jokkorde maa dog tan so piilol Markdown maa ena heɓoo e enternet.
modal.dataProtocolBody: Loowdi janngirde fof ko Base64 walla URI kodiraa tee naatnaa e data-URI. Sababunde Base64 ena waawi woornde e ɗemɗe goɗɗe, URL URI-kodiraaɗo kadi ena sosaa. Kono ɗum ena dog tan e janngirɗe stuttude; so janngirde ndee juuti, URI oo kadi juutata. So a lollinii taƴtorde maa e jaɓɓorgal ɓatakuru, tawtoro adii hay huunde sottaaka. Kadi browseruuji ceertuɗi ndarnday URL juuteendi ceertuɗi... (Suɓo yamre ɓurnde stuttude)
modal.snapshotBody: Nate jamma ko URLuuji jogiiɗi siforde janngirde ndee fof. Kono ɗum ena dog tan e janngirɗe stuttude; so janngirde ndee juuti, URL oo kadi juutata. So a lollinii taƴtorde maa e jaɓɓorgal ɓatakuru, tawtoro adii hay huunde sottaaka. Kadi browseruuji ceertuɗi ndarnday URL juuteendi ceertuɗi...
modal.embedBody: Natto koddu HTML oo e lowre maa ngam naatnude ndee janngirde no misaal. Aɗa waawi kadi waylude URL oo e goɗɗum e ɗee ngam udditde taƴtorde walla jiytindagol beɗɗo:

prompt.shareFileUrl: tiiɗno naatnu URL piilol Markdown ngo aɗa yiɗi lollinde

examples.footer: Ɗum ko taƴtorde geese gollondiral ngam {liascript}. Loowdi fof ena danndaa tan e browser maa. Yiylo {templates} naatnotooɗe walla {courses} bayyinaaɗe kisa.

index.footer: Ɗum ko taƴtorde geese gollondiral ngam {liascript}. Loowdi fof ena danndaa tan e browser maa. So aɗa sokli hakkillo, ƴeewto {examples} amen, yiylo {templates} naatnotooɗe walla {courses} bayyinaaɗe kisa.

import.heading: Import from
import.title: Create a new project
import.newDesc: Start with a blank document and write from scratch.
import.uploadDesc: Pick a Markdown file or a ZIP archive from your device.
import.githubDesc: Import the files of a public GitHub repository.
import.urlDesc: Load a Markdown file or ZIP archive from a web link.
import.gistDesc: Import all files of a GitHub Gist into a new project.
import.localFolderDesc: Open a folder on your computer (Chrome / Edge only).
import.githubHint: Pick the files to import on the next screen.
import.urlHint: Loads a Markdown file or a ZIP archive into a new project.
import.gistHint: Imports all files of the gist into a new project.

errors.generic: Import failed. Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidRepo: Could not recognise a GitHub repository in that input.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
errors.invalidGist: Could not find a gist for that ID.
errors.fetchFailed: Could not load the resource. Check the URL and your connection.

card.deleteConfirm: Aɗa yenanaa yiɗde momtude ɗeeɗol ngol haa badaa?

toast.compileHint: Aɗa waawi waylude tee kompilaade ndee janngirde e {ctrl}, kono so aɗa yiɗi danndude bayle maa haa badaa, aɗa foti waɗde fork!
toast.compileHintEmbed: Aɗa waawi waylude tee kompilaade ndee janngirde e {ctrl}, walla udditde nde e {link}.
toast.compileHintEmbedOnly: Aɗa waawi waylude tee kompilaade ndee janngirde e {ctrl}
toast.viewOnLiaScript: So aɗa yiɗi yiyde janngirde ndee e LiaScript, dobo {here}.
toast.toolbarHint: Huutoro palal kuutorɗe ngam waylude hakkunde taƴtorde e jiytindagol.

github.badCredentials: Keɓe seŋorde moƴƴaani, hello nana loowtaa

menu.importTooltip: Import files from a GitHub repository
menu.pushTooltip: Commit and push changes to the linked repository
menu.pullTooltip: Fetch changes from the linked repository
menu.publishTooltip: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files

import.title: Import from GitHub
import.repoHint: Public repositories can be imported without a token.
import.truncated: This repository is very large; the file list was truncated by GitHub.
import.emptyRepo: This repository is empty. An empty README.md will be created to start your project.

push.title: Push to GitHub
push.remoteDrift: The repository changed on GitHub since your last sync. Consider pulling first; unchanged remote files are preserved.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.upToDate: Your project is up to date with GitHub.

pat.intro: Add a Personal Access Token (PAT) to raise the rate limit and to access private repositories or push changes.
pat.howtoToggle: How do I create a token?
pat.step2: Choose a name and an expiration, then select the repositories you want to use.
pat.step3Write: Under "Repository permissions" set "Contents" to "Read and write".
pat.step4: Generate the token, copy it and paste it below.

errors.badUrl: Please enter a valid repository (owner/repo or a GitHub URL).
errors.notFound: Repository, branch or file not found.
errors.network: Could not reach GitHub. Please check your connection.

publish.title: Publish to a new repository
publish.intro: Create a new GitHub repository and push all project files into it.

nostr.title: Lollin rewde e Nostr
nostr.publicKeyHint: Kelal maa peñcu huutoraama ngam anndinde maa e resoo Nostr.
nostr.privateKeyHint: Kelal maa suturo ena soklaa ngam siifde tee bayyinde binndanɗe. Danndu ngal e kisal.
nostr.storeCredentials: Danndu keɓe seŋorde e ndee browser
nostr.storeCredentialsWarning: Danndude kelal suturo e browser ena newi kono kisal mum ina famɗi.
nostr.relayPlaceholder: Naatnu serweruuji relay (gooto e kala doggol)
nostr.relayHint: Naatnu serweruuji relay (gooto e kala doggol) ɗi loowdi maa bayyinte.
nostr.rememberRelays: Siiftor ɗee relay ngam binndanɗe garooje
nostr.saveKeyWarningBody: Ngal kelal suturo ena hokka naatde e innital maa Nostr. Danndu ngal e kisal.
nostr.intro: Lollin janngirde maa e renndo Nostr. Aɗa waawi bayyinde beɗɗo walla adii taƴtaade binndannde maa.
nostr.embedMedia: Naatnu piille media no data URI
nostr.embedMediaHint: Wayla nate, ojooji e widewoo e data URI naatnaaɗi ngam ɓurnde weeɓtude lollinde.
nostr.messagePlaceholder: Ɓeydu ɓatakuru ngam binndannde Nostr maa...
nostr.alertGenerateFailed: Sosde pasangan kelme woorii. Tiiɗno eto kadi.
nostr.alertMissingKeys: Tiiɗno naatnu kelal peñcu e kelal suturo maa hade bayyinde.
nostr.alertMissingRelay: Tiiɗno naatnu serwer relay gooto hay.
nostr.alertPublishFailed: Bayyinde e resoo Nostr woorii. Tiiɗno eto kadi.
nostr.alertMissingPrivateKey: Tiiɗno hokku kelal maa suturo ngam siifde tee bayyinde binndannde.

toolbar.noPreview: Jiytindagol alaa ngam oo fannu piilol.

exporter.title: LiaScript Exporter
exporter.urlHint: Start the exporter locally with 'liaex serve', or enter the address of a hosted exporter. The project is sent to this server and converted there.
exporter.resendTitle: Send the current project to the exporter again
exporter.handed: Project handed to the exporter. Choose a format/preset below and start the export.
exporter.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a full address, e.g. http://localhost:3000
exporter.errorMixedContent: This editor runs over HTTPS and cannot embed an insecure HTTP exporter (except localhost). Please use an HTTPS exporter URL.
exporter.errorNoHandshake: Could not reach the exporter. Make sure it is running ('liaex serve') and reachable at this URL, and that it allows being embedded.
exporter.errorNoProject: No active project found to export.
exporter.errorSend: Failed to package and send the project.

menu.openTooltip: Link a folder on your computer to this project
menu.syncTooltip: Compare and sync this project with the linked folder

sync.title: Synchronize with local folder
sync.inSync: Editor and folder are already in sync.

errors.noFolder: No folder is linked to this project yet.
errors.permission: Access to the folder was denied. Please grant permission to continue.
